how do i verify my kyc?: Full KYC verification is necessary to ensure that your prepaid payment instrument balances do not exceed Rs. 2,00,000/- at any given point in time. You will need to carry original as well as photo copies of your KYC document.

who is gagan sethi: According to the context, Mr. Gagan Sethi is a results-driven global executive and the CEO. He has over three decades of leadership experience in the FinTech and InsurTech industries.
what all flight offers: Multi-payment facility, Guest / Registered user login options, Alerts for trip progress and e-tickets delivery via mail and SMS. Loyalty points can be earned through bookings on the portal. These are some of the flight offers available according to the provided context.
who is mr gagan sethi: Gagan Sethi is a global executive with over thirty years of experience leading FinTech and InsurTech platforms combining software innovation with scalable infrastructure. He holds an Engineering degree in Computer Science, a Master’s degree in Business Management, and has previously been instrumental in building the Ebix Technology business from scratch under his leadership within the Ebix family.
